commands.name: list
commands.description: Show all the locations under a bootcamp

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Find challenges and convert to the training module file

options.name: --output
options.description: OutputFileName to use. Defaults to module.json Default: "module.json".

options.name: --skip
options.description: Skip the output to file. Default: "False".

arguments.name: folder
arguments.description: Root folder of the training module.

commands.name: graph
commands.description: Generate a graph of a challenge type in a training module file

options.name: -f
options.description: The format of the output Valid values: "Ascii", "Dot". Default: "Ascii".

arguments.name: folder
arguments.description: Root folder of the training module.

commands.name: serve
commands.description: Start a local web server to help test the training module

arguments.name: folder
arguments.description: Root folder of the training module.

options.name: -a
options.description: Set to true, to also output the actions. Default: "False".

options.name: -c
options.description: Set to true, to also output the contents. Default: "False".

arguments.name: folder
arguments.description: Root folder of the training module.
